pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AI-S-018 (AI and Machine Learning/Skill) excluded as out_of_scope (composite 0.521, highest: NIST AI RMF at 0.521). Domain prior: out. Core hits: 0. OOS hits: 0. pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence challenge the exclusion of this AI and Machine Learning KSA (composite 0.521)?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Market analysis of Data Lifecycle Manager job postings does not surface this AI and Machine Learning competency as a standard requirement at the relevant level. Exclusion consistent with role focus.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Exclusion upheld. Market evidence consistent with exclusion. Final decision: exclude.
